overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval stone castle interior. The character ascends a spiral stairwell from a ground floor chamber to an upper great hall with large arched windows and a central fire pit, transitioning from torchlit artificial lighting to natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor storage chamber with wooden scaffolding

events.description: character approaches and passes through wooden door into stairwell

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a dimly lit stone chamber toward a doorway with a wall torch

entered.detail: wooden cage-like structure against the left wall
lit torch mounted on stone wall beside the door
heavy wooden door with metal studs leading to stairs
rough hewn gray stone walls surrounding the chamber
scattered rubble and broken tiles on the floor

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores a ground floor stone chamber with wooden scaffolding on the left and a lit wall torch. The floor is covered in debris as he approaches a heavy wooden door leading to the stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral stone stairwell with wall sconces

events.description: enters narrow stone stairwell from ground floor chamber
passing wall sconces creates alternating light and shadow on stone walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the spiral stone staircase, swords visible on his back, following the curving steps upward

entered.detail: arched stone doorways visible on landings
metal wall-mounted torches providing dim light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a tight spiral stone stairwell, leaving the ground floor behind. Wall sconces cast flickering light on the rough stone walls as Geralt climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stairwell with leaded glass windows

events.description: natural daylight becomes visible through leaded glass windows at top of stairs
exits stairwell into upper corridor with tall windows

agents.ego_description: Geralt reaching the top of the stairs where natural light streams through leaded glass windows

entered.detail: tall windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in daylight
thick stone pillars supporting the upper structure

segments.scene_description: As Geralt nears the top of the stairwell, natural daylight filters through leaded glass windows, illuminating the stone columns and changing the atmosphere from torchlit darkness to mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with central fire pit and arched windows

events.description: enters large great hall from narrow corridor
character turns to survey the hall and the central fire pit

agents.ego_description: Geralt entering the spacious great hall and looking around at the fire pit and arched windows

entered.detail: circular stone structure with burning fire in the center of the hall
tall gothic arched windows with bright daylight streaming through

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a vast great hall with a central fire pit burning brightly. Tall arched windows line the walls allowing natural light to flood the space, illuminating the red tiled floor and scattered debris as the character surveys the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, torchlit ground floor chamber up into a vast, sun-drenched great hall. It begins amidst the debris and wooden scaffolding of a stone room, moving toward a heavy wooden door that opens into a tight spiral stairwell. As the character ascends, the flickering light of wall sconces guides the way through the rough stone passage before natural daylight begins to filter through leaded glass windows. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the stairwell into a wide hall, where the atmosphere shifts from torchlit darkness to a bright space flooded with light from tall arched windows. Finally, the view opens across a red tiled floor toward a brightly burning central fire pit and scattered ruins.
